column1: Frost Protection vs % V/V Prorylene Glycol

Freezing point according to ASTM D 1177 is the temperature for the first ice crystal formation.
 DIN 51583 normative establishes the temperature from the product does not flow and there is danger for the circuit
integrity.
 Between both temperatures exists a mixture of ice crystals and not-frozen fluid that flows without volume increase,
thus, without bursting problems.
